title: daphne odora var. mazelii
intro: Daphne odora var. mazelii, also known as the 'Aureo-Variegata' or 'Mazel's Daphne', is a variety of the Daphne odora plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Daphne odora var. mazelii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial properties. Daphne odora var. mazelii can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity.
